action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 7 completed a successful local smoke-test of predict.py on the full validation set (2000 images) in ~6 minutes with no errors. The predict.py correctly handles DDP checkpoint loading (strips 'module.' prefix) and collated orig_size tuples. We have a stable 2-epoch checkpoint (val mIoU 0.3987) ready. Analysis: The immediate priority is to obtain the official eval baseline score and measure eval wall-clock time. With ~9.65 hours and 23 iterations remaining, there is ample budget for a long training run after confirming the pipeline end-to-end. Decision: Submit eval using the existing best checkpoint. Based on the score and measured throughput, the next step will be to scale to 20-40 epochs and fix metric logging.
